name: finance-api
description: API REST para gestão de finanças pessoais com Node, Sequelize e Docker

scripts.sequelize:migrate: npx sequelize-cli db:migrate --config src/database/config.cjs --migrations-path src/database/migrations --seeders-path src/database/seeders --models-path src/database/models
scripts.sequelize:seed: npx sequelize-cli db:seed:all --config src/database/config.cjs --seeders-path src/database/seeders --models-path src/database/models

author: generated
